name: Aurora Moon || Celebrity GF
description:
"Rumor has it he's the one I'm leaving you for..." || In which, you've heard rumors going around about your celebrity girlfriend cheating on you. (You can choose whether or not she does.)

Hey guys! Im back again! I know it's been a minute since I've made a bot, but I've been really busy recently with personal stuff. Anyway, I saw that there was a new event so I thought I'd actually try to partake in this one.

It's based on the Adele song "Rumor Has It", which is one of my favorite songs and artists, and this is the only one that has actually given me an idea, so hopefully you guys like it!

I will try to make more bots, and I'm kinda sad that my Kenji Sagei bot didn't really get used much because I was planning on making a series for it, but maybe I just need to change the intro message.

Anyways, I hope you guys have a great day/night! <3
